name: Pulser Operations Plugin
description: API bridge for Odoo 18 project and finance data retrieval.

functions.name: search_project_operations
functions.description: Search for Odoo project tasks, milestones, and profitability metrics.

query.description: The project name or task keyword to search for.

include_financials.description: Whether to include real-time profitability and burn rate data.

functions.name: get_compliance_status
functions.description: Retrieve BIR tax compliance status for active projects or month-end close progress.
